info.name: Paragon Proxy GET request to integration

params.name: projectId
params.description: Your Paragon Project ID.

params.name: integrationType
params.description: The type of integration to proxy the request to (e.g., salesforce, hubspot, slack).

params.name: apiPath
params.description: The API path of the third-party provider to send the request to.

items.docs: Send a GET request to a third-party integration API on behalf of a Connected User. The request is proxied through Paragon to the integration provider.
